info.title: Feloxi API
info.description: Celery task monitoring and management API

get.summary: Return the current user info (used by frontend to check if session is active).
List all orgs the current user belongs to (for org switcher).

parameters.name: agent_id
parameters.description: Filter by broker/agent ID (for per-broker throughput charts).

parameters.name: agent_id
parameters.description: Filter by broker/agent ID (for per-broker throughput charts).

parameters.name: agent_id
parameters.description: Filter by broker/agent ID (for per-broker throughput charts).

oneOf.description: Trigger when task failure rate exceeds threshold.
Trigger when queue depth exceeds threshold.
Trigger when a worker goes offline.
Trigger when task duration exceeds threshold at given percentile.
Trigger when a beat schedule misses its expected run.
Trigger when a specific task name fails.
Trigger when no events received for a period.
Trigger when task throughput deviates from historical baseline (Z-score).
Trigger when task latency deviates from historical baseline (Z-score).
Trigger when error rate spikes compared to recent baseline.

AuthResponse.description: Successful auth response. Tokens are set as HttpOnly cookies, NOT in the body.

BrokerStats.description: Broker-specific stats for the detail page.

ChannelDeliveryStatus.description: Delivery status for a single notification channel.

CommandResponse.description: Response for task retry/revoke and worker shutdown commands.

CreateApiKeyResponse.description: Response after creating an API key (includes the raw key, shown once).

tenant_slug.description: Optional: if the user belongs to multiple orgs, they must specify which one.

agent_id.description: Filter by broker/agent ID (for per-broker throughput charts).

OrgPickerResponse.description: Returned when the user's email is in multiple orgs and no slug was provided.

OverviewResponse.description: Dashboard overview metrics (computed from ClickHouse + Redis).

OverviewStats.description: Summary stats for the dashboard overview.

QueueListResponse.description: List of queue depths from a broker.

QueueMetricsRow.description: Per-minute queue metrics from the materialized view.

StringListResponse.description: List of string values (task names, queue names).

SwitchOrgRequest.description: Switch to a different org (re-issues tokens for that org).

TaskEventRow.description: ClickHouse row type for task_events table.

TaskMetricsRow.description: Per-minute task metrics from the materialized view.

TaskTimelineResponse.description: Task event timeline (all state transitions for a single task).

WorkerDetailResponse.description: Single worker detail with current state and recent events.

WorkerListResponse.description: Worker list with online set, ClickHouse events, and Redis states.

WorkerState.description: Cached worker state from Redis (set by broker pipeline on heartbeat events).
